### install foundry-rs/forge-std
```shell
$ forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-commit --no-git
```
### install openzeppelin-contracts
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts  --no-git
```

### install openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable
```shell
$ forge install openzeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable  --no-git
```

### deploy 
```shell
$ forge script script/Deploy.s.sol -vvv --rpc-url=https://bsc.blockrazor.xyz --broadcast --private-key=[privateKey] --slow
```

### build router constructor
```shell
(
        address _treasury, 
        address _queue, 
        address _referrals,
        address _USDT
)
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(address,address,address,address)" 0xeF1A63454bf8a0400a90C07FBb7DEb490bAD4E08  0x4DFdF40117039A5caeeD9A9a13eF1453e2697314 0xe4F7d7c1eF0CD00A489Ce1f3280Ea3Cc9F5747a7 0x7816C568448A25B75197D106E2e4DBC0FD9fa3C8
```
### verify router contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x078611fe3180271C4AdD917924c781f347eD71C3 src/Router.sol:Router  --constructor-args 0x000000000000000000000000ef1a63454bf8a0400a90c07fbb7deb490bad4e080000000000000000000000004dfdf40117039a5caeed9a9a13ef1453e2697314000000000000000000000000e4f7d7c1ef0cd00a489ce1f3280ea3cc9f5747a70000000000000000000000007816c568448a25b75197d106e2e4dbc0fd9fa3c8 --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build lex constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEX" "LEX" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0x9990815e5c32F0c1ff2fc7746b3f448cc35B40A3 0x7816C568448A25B75197D106E2e4DBC0FD9fa3C8
```

### verify lex contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x26a76CcA2f992F5F467184B437dCBb27591675B1 src/token/Lex.sol:Lex  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```


### build leo constructor
```shell
$ cast abi-encode "constructor(string,string,address,address,address)" "LEO" "LEO" 0xc263D128DdbA54405edDD34C059aD6F342a42a05 0xBF69aC91b3F0022e3335062824DC64a5Fc3Ab24C 0x7816C568448A25B75197D106E2e4DBC0FD9fa3C8

```

### verify leo contract
```shell
$ forge verify-contract --chain-id 56 --compiler-version v0.8.30+commit.a1b79de6 0x567DC8bA4ff35c196a5b736D77aEf42dFB58A6dD src/token/Leo.sol:Leo  --constructor-args  --etherscan-api-key Y43WNBZNXWR5V4AWQKGAQ9RCQEXTUHK88V
```
